mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales indicates improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, so higher RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot RSAFS value 441363.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by nonpositive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and weaker consumption, so a crossing to a higher UNRATE trend predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot UNRATE value 5.5 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When the policy rate is pinned near zero and CPI inflation momentum is falling, real discount-rate pressure eases and liquidity supports equity multiples, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS <= 0.25 and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation change declines versus prior 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot FEDFUNDS value 0.11 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if this joint condition produces 60-day returns below the unconditional 60-day mean in walk-forward tests or if the interaction term has a nonpositive estimated coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates improving factory utilization and operating leverage, so positive 3-month INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot INDPRO value 105.2161 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO momentum crossings above zero are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or have no positive return spread versus negative crossings.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive investment and lower future durable-goods demand, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot HOUST value 897.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or if the downside return spread is statistically insignificant at p > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains accompanied by rising retail sales confirm that job creation is converting into realized spending, so joint PAYEMS and RSAFS momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot PAYEMS value 141183.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive momentum state does not outperform cases where only one series is positive, or if 20-day returns are positive in fewer than 50% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPI inflation while the funds rate remains near zero signals future tightening risk and margin pressure, so the joint state predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS <= 0.25 and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation change rises versus prior 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot CPIAUCSL value 235.186 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if this joint inflation-acceleration condition is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or if its return mean is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in real GDP marks broad demand contraction and earnings downgrades, so negative GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot GDPC1 value 16294.7 as of t-6mo
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 contraction signals are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or if the signal has a positive average return spread.
